title: Medicare Insurance Type and Broad Genomic Profiling in Metastatic Cancer.
snippet: Broad genomic profiling (BGP) is recommended for several types of metastatic cancer but remains underused. Over half of Medicare beneficiaries are enrolled in Medicare Advantage (MA), where cost-containment strategies may limit access to BGP. Whether Medicare payer type and geographic region are associated with BGP use is not well established. To evaluate w...
